positive: A vibrant, highly detailed celestial forest landscape featuring bioluminescent flora and floating crystalline geometric structures. The primary elements are stylized silhouettes of giant, stylized ferns, glowing moon-lily blossoms, and spiraling cosmic dust nebulae forming the background. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a round apparel print. Use deep sapphire blues, electric turquoise, and glowing magenta accents against a muted midnight background. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with Cosmic Maximalism. Lighting: Dramatic, high-contrast ethereal glow, perfect for screen printing or DTG application. Focus on clean lines, bold negative space, and visible texture.
negative: blurry, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, cartoon, sketch, messy, noisy, artifacts, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, sepia
